creator: zakumhashmal@gmail.com
text:
The sidebar on the right is superfluous and unclear. 
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=dc16c9a9a5abf38e8d5f44d5352d1df520673411
Has anyone reported this to wg-quick upstream, ideally with a patch? It would make sense to look for sudo, runas, and su in that sequence until one exists, test it, and send an error if it fails, given that they aim to be a "managed" frontend for WireGuard https://geometry-lite.co
